channel.title: OpenAI News
channel.description: OpenAI announcements for models, APIs, tooling, and developer workflows.

item.title: Introducing GPT-Next Mini for developers
item.description: A faster reasoning model with better developer ergonomics and lower latency for production use.

item.title: OpenAI launches eval tooling for agent workflows
item.description: New tooling to help teams benchmark agents, prompts, and production workflows.
